benefits.benefit_explanation: Azithromycin belongs to the Antibiotic group. An antibiotic used to treat bacterial infections such as throat, chest, and skin infections. In simple terms, it may help manage the condition written in the prescription, but the exact reason, dose, and duration should always be confirmed with the doctor. Avoid changing the dose or replacing it with another medicine without medical advice.
benefits.patient_note: Take this medicine only as prescribed by your doctor.

benefits.benefit_explanation: Paracetamol belongs to the Fever / Pain Relief group. Used to reduce fever and relieve mild to moderate pain such as headache and body pain. In simple terms, it may help manage the condition written in the prescription, but the exact reason, dose, and duration should always be confirmed with the doctor. Avoid changing the dose or replacing it with another medicine without medical advice.
benefits.patient_note: Take this medicine only as prescribed by your doctor.

benefits.benefit_explanation: Cetirizine belongs to the Allergy Relief group. Used to reduce allergy symptoms such as sneezing, runny nose, and itching. In simple terms, it may help manage the condition written in the prescription, but the exact reason, dose, and duration should always be confirmed with the doctor. Avoid changing the dose or replacing it with another medicine without medical advice.
benefits.patient_note: Take this medicine only as prescribed by your doctor.
